name: venndor
description: A pragmatic CLI tool designed to cleanly inline Node dependencies directly into a `vendor/` directory in your repository. It acts exactly like standard workspace management but gives you total ownership over the raw source code of the dependencies you pull.
features: Intelligent Package Manager Detection (npm, yarn, pnpm, bun)
Zero Configuration non-destructive integration with package.json workspaces
Diff & Patch Generation for seamless local hacks and emergency fixes
Smart Upgrades that intelligently fetch new versions and attempt to re-apply local modifications
